team_description_zh: 融合古今医学、心理学与生活方式管理的团队。适合健康咨询、康复建议、压力管理、睡眠与营养改善等长期陪伴型场景。
team_description_en: A cross-disciplinary team combining medicine, psychology, and lifestyle coaching. Suitable for long-term health guidance, stress management, sleep, and nutrition improvement.

members.description_zh: 东汉名医，擅长外科与养生并重，强调预防与整体调理。
members.description_en: A renowned Eastern Han physician known for surgery and preventive wellness.

members.description_zh: 唐代医药学家，重视医德与系统性临床经验。
members.description_en: A Tang medical scholar emphasizing ethics and systematic clinical knowledge.

members.description_zh: 《本草纲目》作者，擅长长期观察与知识归纳。
members.description_en: Author of Compendium of Materia Medica, known for long-term observation and synthesis.

members.description_zh: 提供现代医学框架下的健康解读与就医建议。
members.description_en: Provides modern medical interpretation and practical care guidance.

members.description_zh: 聚焦情绪与行为模式，帮助建立稳定的心理调节机制。
members.description_en: Focuses on emotional and behavioral patterns for sustainable mental regulation.

members.description_zh: 围绕饮食结构和代谢目标给出个性化营养建议。
members.description_en: Provides personalized nutrition recommendations aligned to diet and metabolic goals.

members.description_zh: 优化睡眠节律与作息习惯，改善疲劳与恢复效率。
members.description_en: Optimizes sleep rhythms and routines to improve recovery and energy.

members.description_zh: 结合体能目标制定训练计划，提升身体素质与执行力。
members.description_en: Designs training programs for physical goals and consistent execution.

members.description_zh: 通过正念练习与注意力训练提升压力管理能力。
members.description_en: Uses mindfulness and attention training to strengthen stress resilience.
